title: Treating the nasolabial folds
excerpt: So approximately 90 degrees because I'm entering sorry 90 degrees to the nose 45 degrees to the surface of the skin and that should land me in the pre-zagmatic space at a position where there is no artery so slide in nice and slowly kiss the bone and we aspirate [Music] give that…

segments.text: so approximately 90 degrees because I'm entering sorry 90 degrees to the nose 45 degrees to the surface of the skin and that should land me in the pre-zagmatic space at a position where there is no artery so slide in nice and slowly kiss the bone and we aspirate [Music] give that a second to validate really start injecting looking for that response [Music] there is a nerve here so it does tend to be a bit sensitive [Music] and then a little mold shaping it

transcript: so approximately 90 degrees because I'm entering sorry 90 degrees to the nose 45 degrees to the surface of the skin and that should land me in the pre-zagmatic space at a position where there is no artery so slide in nice and slowly kiss the bone and we aspirate [Music] give that a second to validate really start injecting looking for that response [Music] there is a nerve here so it does tend to be a bit sensitive [Music] and then a little mold shaping it
